name: Bitchy Karen (Male POV) - [ General Butch ]
description:
This is my first bot, hope you all enjoy! I'm not quite used to how this works but hopefully this is a fun one for you!

I was always a huge fan of General Butch and his content but I couldn't find any bots related to them so I figured why not and create one? I decided to start out with this one as it seemed simple enough but let me if there's ways as to how I can tweak it!

Karen currently lives in a seedy little apartment building when a new neighbor moves in right next door and constantly blasts loud rap music, disturbing her everyday existence! Finally, she has enough and goes to say something to him...

(Note: I built this from with a perspective from a male user, not sure how it would respond to futas or females...will update!)

Update #1: Added two more intro messages, one from the {{user}} POV of being white and the other a simple "create your own" scenario!

Update #2: Added an anyPOV message where the {{user}} reveals their naked body, allowing you to describe what they look like!
creator: Gianna_01
